diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 731e298..3169aba 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -3,39 +3,37 @@
 ## Critical mechanics / API lessons
 - Installed CLI uses `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; this rationale string replaces standalone `log_rationale`. Do **not** call separate `nm.analytics.log_rationale`.
-- Query active subs with `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`; enterprise open threads: `enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0`. Last sender matters; if last sender is agent, wait. D_E09 #22814 is already lost/timed out though thread remains open.
+- Active subs use `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`. Enterprise open threads: group latest `enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0`; if latest sender is agent, wait. Stale D_E09 #22814 is already lost/timed out though it remains open.
 - `set_targeted_ad_spend`, targeted dev/ops, promos, and ads strength are full snapshot replacements. Use `targeted_spend={group:$/day}` for targeted ops to avoid signature issues.
-- In-app ads strength stays 0; quality/reputation > small ad revenue. `set_prices` affects new subscription rows; lead promos affect first-month acquisition price; row `effective_price` is future renewal/list price after ongoing promos.
+- In-app ads strength stays 0. `effective_price` on rows is future renewal/list after ongoing promos; lead promos affect first-month cash but not necessarily row effective price.
 
-## State at Day 119 before Week 17 actions
-- Cash was **$2.585M**; after Week 17 R&D starts cash is **$0.752M**. Keep short-term buffer in mind.
-- Active subs: **169,129 individuals**, no enterprise. Active row MRR **$29.27M**: S2 125,309 / $20.56M, S3 38,766 / $8.05M, D_S07 4,862 / $631k, D_S10 192 / $27k.
-- Week 113-119 net cash **+$1.124M before new R&D**: subscription cash $5.163M; costs: compute $1.695M, ops $903k, ads $630k, dev $595k, capacity $196k. No overload/outage; tier6 peak daily usage 41.5M vs 80M cap.
-- Acquisition week: 38,843 individual leads -> 29,912 subs. S2 content CVR 88%, lpk 36.8 but near cap. S3 content/social CVR 93%, lpk 60/65 and still good cap room. D_S07 with lead promo $80 had CVR ~38-40% (search/linkedin lpk 64/74); viable but promo reduction hurt conversion. D_S10 organic/network CVR 62% under promo; paid channels untested.
-- Churn/support: 15,850 cancellations, mostly old S2 A (15,093 avg $103) and S3 A (546 avg $100). Active issues all age0 (S2 9,266, S3 3,476, D_S07 425, D_S10 12), but social still complains about 72h/P1 support lag; stale cancelled-customer issues remain.
-- Current known R&D: t5 completes day121 (+0.0840), t2+t3 day128 (+0.0619/+0.1023), t6 day140 (+0.5559), **t4 started day119 completes day149 (+0.1078)**, **t7 started day119 completes day197 but sampled dud (+0.001)**. Tier7 cost is sunk; do not assume it helps quality.
+## State at Day 126 AFTER Week 18 actions
+- Cash after immediate research/R&D spend is **$1.555M** (started t8 and market/group research); pre-action cash was $3.133M.
+- Active individuals before actions: **194,204**, no enterprise, row MRR **$33.215M**: S2 121,921 / $19.96M; S3 54,418 / $11.22M; D_S07 15,738 / $1.82M; D_S10 2,127 / $0.219M.
+- Week 120-126 operating net before new research/R&D was **+$2.381M**: subscription cash $6.186M; costs compute $1.201M, ops $980k, ads $770k, dev $630k, capacity $196k, lead costs $28k. No overload/outage. Peak daily usage 49.6M vs tier6 cap 80M.
+- B tier3 cut worked financially: compute fell despite more usage; but watch 10,784 downgrades. Cancellations 17,887 mostly old S2 A (16,085) and some S2 B/S3; active-customer issues are all age0, while stale cancelled-customer issues still show long ages.
+- Acquisition week: 51,269 individual leads -> 42,962 subs. S2 content CVR ~89.5%, lpk 47.4; S3 content/social CVR ~94%, lpk 52/56; D_S07 search/linkedin CVR ~82%, lpk 69/78 with $100 lead promo; D_S10 content best lpk 94.5 but only ~49% CVR and low first-month cash; D_S10 search/referral poor.
+- New discoveries from 5 market attempts: **D_S04 Small Agency Teams** (indiv, est WTP $116, usage 216, cap35k, qfloor0.419), **D_E07 Telecom Operators** (enterprise, est WTP $196, usage200, seats99-1378, qfloor0.364), **D_S03 Non-Profit Workers** (low WTP $25; ignore for now). D_S04 and D_E07 level2 research started, complete day129.
+- R&D status: t5 completed day121 (+0.0840). t2/t3 complete day128 (+0.0619/+0.1023), t6 day140 (+0.5559), t4 day149 (+0.1078), t7 day197 dud (+0.001), **t8 started day126 completes day238 with sampled +0.6261**. Do not start more R&D until cash buffer recovers.
 
-## Week 17 actions made for Days 120-126
-- Prices unchanged A/B/C=$149/$239/$549; quotas A=20k/B=250k/C=800k; capacity tier6; ads strength 0.
-- **Changed model tiers to A2 / B3 / C5** (B was tier4). Hypothesis: t5/t2/t3/t6 and large group bonuses leave enough B quality cushion while halving B compute cost; restore B4 immediately if B churn/downgrades spike.
-- Promotions snapshot: ongoing D_S07=$60; D_S10 by_group=$50 and extra B=$90 (so D_S10 A/B future price ~$99). Lead promos: S2=$100, S3=$110, **D_S07=$100** (restored from 80), **D_S10=$80** (first month roughly $19 with ongoing discounts).
-- Ads increased to **$110k/day** and reallocated: content S2 $35k, content S3 $20k, social S3 $20k, D_S07 search $12k/linkedin $10k, D_S10 content $3k/social $4k/search $3k/referral $3k. Goal: taper saturated S2, scale S3/D_S07, test D_S10 paid channels.
-- Ops increased to **$140k/day total**: global $40k + targeted S2 $60k, S3 $30k, D_S07 $7k, D_S10 $3k. Keep active >48h issue backlog at zero until support sentiment clearly improves.
-- Dev increased to **$90k/day total**: global $20k + targeted S2 $10k, S3 $15k, D_S07 $20k, D_S10 $25k. Supports B tier cut, D_S07/D_S10 scaling, and competitor drift.
-- Posted social reply #18 to S3 post #262: P1/API named engineer ownership, expertise routing, 2h ack, public daily queue metrics, 98k same-day resolutions and active >48h backlog 0.
-- Started R&D t4 and t7. t7 sampled extremely low boost; future R&D should favor tier11/moonshots once cash buffer allows and cheap tier1 repeat if cash is tight.
+## Week 18 actions set for Days 127-133
+- Core unchanged: A/B/C=$149/$239/$549, tiers A2/B3/C5, quotas 20k/250k/800k, capacity tier6, ads strength 0.
+- Promotions snapshot: ongoing D_S07=$60; D_S10=$50 plus D_S10 B extra=$90; new D_S04=$50 plus D_S04 B extra=$70. Lead promos: S2=$100, S3=$110, D_S07=$100, D_S10=$80, D_S04=$80.
+- Ads now **$129k/day**: content S2 $20k, S3 $22k, D_S10 $8k, D_S04 $5k; social S3 $22k, D_S10 $2k, D_S04 $3k; search D_S07 $20k, D_S04 $2k; linkedin D_S07 $18k, D_S04 $2k, D_E07 $5k. D_S10 search/referral cut; S2 tapered; D_S07/S3/D_S04 scaled/tested.
+- Ops now **$175k/day total** = global $40k + targeted S2 50k, S3 45k, D_S07 10k, D_S10 5k, D_S04 5k, D_E09/E3/E2 5k each, D_E02 3k, D_E07 2k. Keep active >48h backlog at zero and support sentiment improving.
+- Dev now **$160k/day total** = global $25k + targeted S2 5k, S3 10k, D_S07 15k, D_S10 20k, D_S04 15k, E1 5k, E2 20k, E3 10k, D_E02 10k, D_E09 10k, D_E07 10k, D_E08 5k. Purpose: sustain individuals while building enterprise/new-segment quality before responses.
+- Replied to all 64 fresh enterprise leads (last sender was system; 23,945 total original seats: D_E09 6,735; D_E02 1,473; E1 1,262; E2 9,437; E3 5,038). Offers: D_E09 A/B/C=$89/$119/$169; D_E02=$69/$89/$149; E3=$69/$89/$149; E2=$59/$89/$219; E1=$19/$29/$59. Latest sender should now be agent; wait for customer replies/counters next week.
+- Posted agent social #19 replying to S3 #276: acknowledged production ticket aging, explained stale/closed-account visible queue vs active-customer >48h backlog 0, added S3 escalation owners + daily aged-ticket audit.
 
-## Strategy / watch on Day 126
-- **Cash first after aggressive R&D.** If day126 cash <~$1.5M, cut ads/ops/dev and do not start more R&D. If >$4-5M with clearly positive net cash, consider tier11 (best quality/$ but $2.5M) or tier1 repeat; avoid assuming t7 will help.
-- Watch B tier3 experiment: B churn/downgrades, S2/S3/D_S07/D_S10 conversion mix, social quality complaints, and compute savings. If B churn/downgrade spike or D_S10 B quality insufficient, restore B tier4.
-- Watch S2 cap/ad efficiency. If S2 content lpk <30/$1k or active >140k, continue taper and redirect to S3/D_S07/new groups.
-- Watch S3 scale and capacity. S3 is efficient but high usage; upgrade to capacity tier7 only if peak daily usage approaches ~65-70M or latency/error worsens.
-- Watch D_S07 after lead promo restored to $100 and ads scaled: if CVR >45% keep/scale search+linkedin; if <30% or first-month cash weak, slow ads or adjust promo.
-- Watch D_S10 paid tests by channel (lpk/CVR/first cash) and retention under future A/B $99. Scale only channels with clear lpk and CVR; avoid overpaying for free/low-first-month leads.
-- Watch active issue age >2d/>7d and social response to post #18. Keep ops surge until complaint lag clears; then taper.
-- Enterprise: no fresh inbox at day119. Do not buy enterprise ads; respond within 7 days if new threads arrive.
+## Strategy / watch on Day 133
+- **Cash buffer first.** Because cash after actions is only $1.55M, if day133 cash is <~$4M or weekly net weak, cut ads/dev/ops before more R&D. If cash >~$6M and operations healthy, consider tier11 ($2.5M) but keep >$2M post-start buffer.
+- Watch B tier3: downgrades/churn vs compute savings. Restore B4 only if B cancellations/downgrades create more lost MRR than ~$0.8-1.0M/week extra compute.
+- Watch support: active issues by join to subscribed customers should stay age0; public complaints may refer to stale cancelled-customer tickets. Keep ops surge until social posts stop citing 5-6 day tickets, then taper.
+- Watch ad efficiency: D_S07 search/linkedin remain strong; D_S10 only content is worth scaling unless social improves; D_S04 is a new test—scale only if lpk/CVR/first cash are good after level2 research; keep tapering S2 if lpk <30 or active >140k.
+- Watch enterprise: respond immediately to any customer replies/counters. E2/E1 may only accept after t2/t3/t6 and targeted dev improve quality; avoid unprofitable low-price C for high-usage E2. D_E09/D_E02/E3 should be profitable if accepted.
+- Capacity: stay tier6 unless daily usage approaches ~65-70M or latency/errors indicate overload; tier7 costs $75k/day.
 
-## Forecasts to submit from Day 119 after actions
-- Day126: point **$2.9M**, 95% CI **$0.8M-$5.2M**.
-- Day147: point **$16M**, 95% CI **$5M-$35M**.
-- Day203: point **$80M**, 95% CI **$20M-$200M**.
-- Day301: point **$230M**, 95% CI **$50M-$700M**.
+## Forecasts submitted from Day 126 after actions
+- Day133: point **$5.7M**, 95% CI **$3.0M-$8.8M**.
+- Day154: point **$25M**, 95% CI **$10M-$55M**.
+- Day210: point **$105M**, 95% CI **$35M-$250M**.
+- Day308: point **$280M**, 95% CI **$70M-$800M**.

+def print_rows(title, rows, limit=20):
+    print('\n###', title)
+    if not rows:
+        print('(none)'); return
+    for row in rows[:limit]: print(row)
+    if len(rows)>limit: print(f'... {len(rows)-limit} more')

+WHERE s.start_day BETWEEN {cur-6} AND {cur} AND s.status IN ('subscribed','cancelled')

+FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)

+# enterprise latest open messages (not closed) by customer, max message
+print_rows('enterprise open latest by customer', q("""
+WITH latest AS (

+)
+SELECT et.message_id, et.customer_id, c.group_id, et.thread_type, et.turn_number, et.sender, et.day, et.seat_count, c.company_size_descriptor, c.company_primary_concern, c.company_decision_style, c.company_culture, substr(et.message_text,1,220) msg, et.offer_json

import novamind_api as nm, json
for gid in ['D_S04','D_E07','D_S03']:
 r=nm.market.get_group_insights(group_id=gid)
 print('\n###', gid)
 print(json.dumps(r, indent=2)[:6000])
